data.config.yml:
tunnel: notebook
credentials-file: /etc/cloudflared/creds/credentials.json

ingress:
  - hostname: gda.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://gda-shipping-workloader.gda.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: budget.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://firefly-app.firefly.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: n8n.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://n8n.firefly.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: finan.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://gestao-financeira-gestao-financeira.gestao-financeira.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: finan-hlg.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://gestao-hlg-gestao-financeira.gestao-financeira-hlg.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: cidade-viva.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://cidade-viva-web.cidade-viva.svc.cluster.local:80
  - hostname: argocd.jgpjunior.online
    service: https://argocd-server.argocd.svc.cluster.local:80
    originRequest:
      noTLSVerify: true
  - hostname: loja-roupas.jgpjunior.online
    service: http://loja-roupas-wordpress.loja-roupas.svc.cluster.local:80
  - service: http_status:404
